gradeRationale: The supplied EPA data contains an unresolved status-K record for unnamed contaminant code 2049, although duplicate records with the same violation ID are marked resolved. All other listed violations are resolved and all are identified as non-health-based; no measured contaminant concentrations or health-limit exceedances are provided.
summary: This active community groundwater system serves 4,000 people. The records show several resolved, non-health-based compliance violations and one unresolved status-K entry with conflicting duplicate resolved entries; they do not document a health-based contaminant exceedance.

contaminants.name: Consumer Confidence Report Rule
contaminants.whatItIs: A public reporting rule; this record began October 1, 2015 and is marked resolved.
contaminants.healthEffects: The supplied record is non-health-based and provides no contaminant exposure or health-effect data.

contaminants.name: Revised Total Coliform Rule
contaminants.whatItIs: A microbial-rule compliance record covering October 2018; it is marked resolved.
contaminants.healthEffects: The supplied record is non-health-based and does not report microbial test results or associated health effects.

contaminants.name: Contaminant code 2049
contaminants.whatItIs: The supplied data provides no contaminant name or category. Duplicate entries for this violation ID conflict: two are marked resolved, while one is unresolved with status K, all for calendar year 2022.
contaminants.healthEffects: Unavailable because the supplied data does not identify the contaminant; the records are marked non-health-based.

contaminants.name: Contaminant code 2805
contaminants.whatItIs: The supplied data provides no contaminant name or category. The 2022 record is marked resolved.
contaminants.healthEffects: Unavailable because the supplied data does not identify the contaminant; the record is marked non-health-based.

contaminants.name: Contaminant code 2806
contaminants.whatItIs: The supplied data provides no contaminant name or category. The 2022 record is marked resolved.
contaminants.healthEffects: Unavailable because the supplied data does not identify the contaminant; the record is marked non-health-based.

contaminants.name: Lead and Copper Rule
contaminants.whatItIs: A lead-and-copper regulatory compliance record beginning in 1997; it is marked resolved.
contaminants.healthEffects: The supplied record is non-health-based and contains no lead or copper measurements, so exposure and health effects cannot be assessed.

contaminants.name: Consumer Confidence Report Rule
contaminants.whatItIs: A public reporting rule record beginning in 2000; it is marked resolved.
contaminants.healthEffects: The supplied record is non-health-based and provides no contaminant exposure or health-effect data.

filterRecommendation.reason: The supplied data does not document a measured contaminant or health-limit exceedance, so it cannot support recommending a specific treatment filter. The unresolved unnamed code-2049 compliance record should be clarified with the water system or regulator.

fish.explanation: Fish safety cannot be determined from these records. The disinfectant type—chlorine versus chloramine—and its concentration are unavailable.

plants.explanation: Plant suitability cannot be determined because hardness, salinity, pH, and contaminant measurements are unavailable.

pets.explanation: The records do not document a health-based exceedance, but they also provide no current water-quality measurements and include an unresolved unnamed compliance record.
